posts.content: Born out of wedlock in Vinci—no formal Latin, so I learned by looking: water, birds, machines.
posts.translation: 生于芬奇镇，私生子身份使我无缘正规拉丁教育——只好观察：水、鸟与机械。

posts.content: In Verrocchio's workshop: line, light, and patience. Art and anatomy were the same inquiry.
posts.translation: 在韦罗基奥作坊：线条、光与耐心。艺术与解剖本是同一探索。

posts.content: The Last Supper in Milan—motion in a wall: who will betray, and when the hand reaches the dish.
posts.translation: 米兰《最后的晚餐》——把运动画进墙里：谁将背叛，手何时伸向盘子。

posts.content: Died at Amboise. notebooks stay—bridges, lungs, water spirals; enough sketches for several lifetimes.
posts.translation: 卒于昂布瓦斯。笔记本仍在——桥梁、肺与水的螺旋；草图够几辈子用。
